UEFA release Sakho drugs ban statement

Right, UEFA have released a pretty comprehensive look at Mamadou Sakho’s failed drugs test, and they have been quite critical of the World Anti Doping Agency for the mix up which cost the Frenchman the end of last season, a place at the Euros and, by the looks of things, potentially his Liverpool career.

The substance found in Sakho’s system, higenamine, was NOT on WADA’s prohibited list, and it is claimed that because the laboratory that checked Sakho sample was in Germany, and not Switzerland, the issue was flagged.

They stated: “Higenamine is not expressly mentioned by name on WADA’s prohibited list.

The fact that the Cologne Laboratory tested for Higenamine but had to check with WADA before making a determination indicates a problem, as does the fact that the Lausanne Laboratory does not test for Higenamine at all.
“In this regard, Dr. Saugy (giving evidence) explained that he has not received any formal instruction from WADA to test for Higenamine and explained that the Lausanne Laboratory would not start testing for Higenamine until such communication is received.

The onus is clearly on WADA to communicate to its laboratories what is and what is not on the prohibited list. There are clearly gaps in communication with regard to Higenamine, something which also tends to support the suggestion that WADA’s own internal procedure and analysis in respect of this substance is incomplete (as discussed above).
“Had WADA finished its own internal process, it would surely have formally communicated this to all of its accredited laboratories (rather than simply making a oneoff determination on request to the Cologne Laboratory). “

Matuidi: 利記?不了!

利物浦下月24日會出訪澳洲，於ANZ球場友賽澳職球隊FC悉尼，屆時包括前隊長謝拉特在內等多位昔日利記球員都肯定會披甲上陣。

謝拉特此前一直未承諾會在這場友賽中上陣，但利物浦領隊高路普透露，當他嘗試與謝四接洽時，卻收到出乎意料的反應。該名德國籍領隊說：「我嘗試問謝拉特的時候，還以為仍需要游說他一下，誰知他一口答應，並馬上問我何時會比賽。他骨子裡就是利物浦的球員，非常期待這場比賽，我亦有同感。我很期待麾下的球員能再次與謝拉特一同踢球，這是一件美事。」

除了謝拉特之外，加歷查、艾格及麥馬拿文等都會在這場比賽中上陣。

除了謝拉特之外，加歷查、艾格及麥馬拿文等都會在這場比賽中上陣。

Jürgen Klopp believes Liverpool would have competed for the title but for “unlucky” injuries that stretched his resources this season.

Klopp: "We can all agree that if we could have played our first 12 or 13 for the whole season it’s not unlikely that it could have worked."

Klopp: "But it’s not important now as we don’t know for sure. It’s not allowed to look back. We have to find a solution for the next game."

Klopp: "We really need all our passion. I said a few days ago that it’s not about playing the best football, it’s about getting results."

Klopp: "Look at the injuries we’ve had – not a lot of muscle ones which is always a sign of intensity - all about individual situations."

Klopp: "Adam, Daniel - different things. Sadio/Phil long-term injuries from challenges. It’s not about the day-to-day, it is just unlucky."

Klopp says there is "nothing negative" about Liverpool’s goalkeeping options as he challenged Simon Mignolet to raise his game even further.

Klopp on Mignolet: "We know what he can do. The only thing a player in a football team cannot do is moan about the situation in public."

Klopp: "Now Loris has to be the real challenger. He deals with the situation really well also. He has said nothing in public."

Klopp: "If something was to happen to Simon we would still have a really strong keeper, and nothing changes in my opinion."

Klopp: "Look at the goals we’ve conceded this season, they don’t make sense as a statistic. 40 in the league. Teams have not outplayed us."

Klopp: "Its not because there’s a fault in our defending style - it is not that we are too high. We don’t concede a lot of goals like this."

【UEFA：沙高根本冇食禁藥】

歐洲足協發表聲音，指世界反運動禁藥機構出錯，令沙高蒙受損失。沙高在上年藥檢中驗出的成分 Higenamine 根本不屬常規禁藥檢查成分之一。上屆藥檢報告發佈後，利物浦決定在裁決前不讓沙高上陣，以免球隊受影響，但這亦令沙高錯過歐霸盃決賽及歐洲國家盃決賽周。結果歐洲足協在六月宣佈沙高並無犯上任何禁藥規定。

Mamadou Sakho has no future at Liverpool - Sky sources

Sky sources understand there will be no way back for Mamadou Sakho at Liverpool, despite the news he should not have served a drugs ban.

Liverpool have so far declined to comment, but we understand they are looking at their options with regard to seeking compensation, given Sakho was unavailable for eight games at the end of last season, including the Europa League final.

However, Sky sources understand there will be no reprieve for Sakho in terms of his Liverpool career and the intention is to move him on in the summer.

Liverpool value the defender at £30m and given the level of club currently tracking him, they will be hopeful of getting that.

Seville were prepared to pay £20m for him in January and at that point he had not played a game this season.

He has since moved to Crystal Palace on loan and has helped them ease away form the relegation zone under Sam Allardyce, helping them win five out of the seven games in which he has featured.

Liverpool continue to monitor 'long-term' target Alexandre Lacazette, according to RMC in France.

The Lyon forward, who scored in last night's Europa League tie between the Ligue 1 club and Besiktas, is one of the most sought after players in European football.

Lacazette has established himself as one of the best marksmen in Europe and is currently enjoying his best season, scoring 31 goals in 40 games.

Dortmund and Atletico Madrid are named by RMC as two other clubs who are very keen on the France international.

Jurgen Klopp is expected to spend big in the summer - especially if Liverpool clinch a top four spot and Champions League football next season.

The likes of Virgil Van Dijk, Naby Keita and Julian Brandt are already on Klopp's summer shopping list.

較早前，英國《天空體育》指出，歐洲足協經已承認於去夏對利物浦中場沙高判處禁賽令，是一個錯誤的決定，並將責任歸咎於世界反興奮劑組織（下稱WADA）。對此，利物浦正考慮採取法律行動 ，狀告歐洲足協和WADA。

《利物浦迴聲報》報導，紅軍高層已尋找法律專家的意見，考慮會否對歐洲足協和WADA的行為作出追究。

去年3月，沙高由於未能通過於歐霸盃賽後的隨機藥檢，而被歐洲足協判以30天的停賽令，而利物浦為協助調查，亦對這名法國後衛處以無限期的內部停賽。故此，沙高先後避戰上屆的歐霸盃決賽，以及於去夏舉行的歐洲國家盃。

值得一提的是，在禁藥事件發生後，沙高便一直未有代表過利物浦一隊上陣，如今更被外借至水晶宮效力。
